Source   Edit  

Spacelift Command ship management for EC4X

Per specification (operations.md:1036, operations.md:288):

  • Spacelift ships are "individual units" NOT squadrons
  • Travel with fleets but separate from combat squadrons
  • Screened behind task force during space/starbase combat
  • Participate in ground combat phase (can be destroyed by ground batteries)

Architecture: Fleet → Squadrons (combat) + SpaceLiftShips (separate)

Imports

../common/types/core, ../common/types/units

Types

CargoType {.pure.} = enum
  None, Marines, Colonists, Supplies
Type of cargo loaded on spacelift ship Source   Edit   
SpaceLiftCargo = object
  cargoType*: CargoType
  quantity*: int
  capacity*: int
Cargo loaded on spacelift ship Source   Edit   
SpaceLiftShip = object
  id*: string
  shipClass*: ShipClass
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
  isCrippled*: bool
  cargo*: SpaceLiftCargo
Individual spacelift unit (NOT a squadron) Per operations.md:1036 "individual units within the fleet" Source   Edit  

Procs

proc `$`(ship: SpaceLiftShip): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
String representation of spacelift ship Source   Edit   
proc canLoad(ship: SpaceLiftShip; cargoType: CargoType): bool {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if ship can load the specified cargo type Source   Edit   
proc isEmpty(ship: SpaceLiftShip): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if ship has no cargo loaded Source   Edit   
proc isFull(ship: SpaceLiftShip): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if ship is at full cargo capacity Source   Edit   
proc loadCargo(ship: var SpaceLiftShip; cargoType: CargoType; quantity: int): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Load cargo onto ship Returns true if successful, false if unable Source   Edit   
proc newSpaceLiftShip(id: string; shipClass: ShipClass; owner: HouseId;
                      location: SystemId): SpaceLiftShip {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create a new spacelift ship Ships start empty (cargo.quantity = 0) Source   Edit   
proc unloadCargo(ship: var SpaceLiftShip): tuple[cargoType: CargoType,
    quantity: int] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Unload all cargo from ship Returns the cargo type and quantity that was unloaded Source   Edit  

Exports

HouseId, SystemId, ShipClass
